content='What is an emergency fund?' additional_kwargs={} response_metadata={} id='8a2e64c7-a415-4b43-906b-066d82bbbccd'

content="An emergency fund is a dedicated savings account for unexpected expenses, avoiding debt, and providing financial stability during crises. Aim for three to six months' worth of living expenses. It helps manage sudden financial challenges without relying on credit.\n\n*Sources: https://www.experian.com/blogs/ask-experian/what-is-an-emergency-fund, https://blucurrent.org/blog/what-is-an-emergency-fund*" additional_kwargs={} response_metadata={} id='b7b2fe09-69c3-4c21-ba2a-58e872776a7a' tool_calls=[] invalid_tool_calls=[]
